gotchas: Missing Many2one root in @api.depends path silently breaks recompute when relation changes
Don't add depends on related= field — the dotted path on the related origin is what triggers
Stored compute on Many2one chain re-fires on every parent write — keep dependency path minimal
Missing return — super result lost, breaks chained action callers
Old-style super(ClassName, self) anti-pattern in v13+ (use bare super())
action_confirm runs in caller's environment — sudo() inside loses tracking context
Specific xpath expr avoids ambiguous match across multi-field views
Inserting after a hidden field places node in DOM but invisible — verify with attrs={'invisible': '...'}
Don't use Class.include() in v17+ — use patch() from @web/core/utils/patch
Always call super.setup() inside patched setup or hooks won't register
patch() applies at module load — patches are NOT idempotent across hot-reload, restart browser
